title: Oden Sails with Roger Toward the World’s Truth
description: On pages 13–16, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Unknown person #14, Toki, Oden, Unknown person #15, Unknown person #16 as Oden travels with Roger, reaches the truth of the world, and returns to a Wano already being poisoned by Orochi and Kaido.
scene: Oden travels with Roger, reaches the truth of the world, and returns to a Wano already being poisoned by Orochi and Kaido.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: To be afraid of being different from you

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: It's because you're just lending money!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: You think it's worthy of a Daimyo!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We will talk about you for a long time

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: And your remarkable way of dying!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Even if you forget me, I don't mind.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: My soul will continue to live on,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You're a pretty serious one aren't ya. Get as strong as you can.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: With a cup of sake, then that suits me!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: A legend had just bowed out,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Now find the protagonists of the next scene,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: lady toki, we just heard of the death of open-sama.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: His last moments were said to be admirable.

dialogue.speaker: Toki
dialogue.text: Toki, I have reached my limits.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A gigantic war, capable of separating the oceans, will surely break out.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If I don't manage to knock down kaido no one of our time will succeed

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: will arise in the new world...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They are the ones who can defeat Kaido!!

dialogue.speaker: Wano Citizens
dialogue.text: A long winter is brewing in Wano.

summary: This section advances the Wano - Oden, Roger, and the Final Voyage storyline with 39 dialogue beats. Oden travels with Roger, reaches the truth of the world, and returns to a Wano already being poisoned by Orochi and Kaido.
